title: PMW Advanced EAS
description: EAS player usable report tool for Protomanly's Weather mod.
body:
This addon for PMW adds a player EAS report system. Now you can report storms to all your friends in your server or if a Admin adds this mod then everyone can report storms!

(REQUIRED MODS: Protomanly's Weather, EAS Addon for ProtoManly's Weather Mod)

This mod is in early phases of development. Changes will be made NOTHING IS FINAL!
